steps.title: Make two points for the line
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,14)$. Its slope is $\frac{1}{9}$, so moving $9$ units right raises $y$ by $1$. That gives a second point, $(9,15)$.

steps.title: Fit the points in Desmos
steps.content: Enter $x_1=[0,9]$ and $y_1=[14,15]$, then run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=\frac{1}{9}$ and $b=14$, so the equation is $y=\frac{1}{9}x+14$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
